critical.mandate: Start with risk assessment — not all areas need equal coverage
Define quality gates for CI pipeline

step.title: Load Project Context
step.action: Read architecture doc, PRD, or project-context.md
Understand system components and their interactions

step.title: Risk Assessment
step.action: Identify high-risk areas: revenue-critical, security-sensitive, complex logic
Rate each area: probability × impact

step.title: Legacy Integration Boundaries (Brownfield)
step.action: If PRD contains "Mode: Brownfield" or project has brownfield-assessment.md: activate this step
Identify integration boundaries: where new code calls legacy code and vice versa
For each boundary: define contract test (input/output schema validation between old and new)
For each legacy API wrapper or adapter: define adapter test (legacy behavior preserved)
If data migration exists: define migration validation tests (row counts, data integrity, rollback verification)
If dual-write strategy: define consistency tests (both stores reflect same state)
Add legacy boundary risks to risk assessment from step 2

step.title: Test Strategy
step.action: Define test levels per component: unit, integration, E2E, contract
Apply test pyramid — most tests at lowest effective level

step.title: Test Plan
step.action: Create test plan with coverage targets per component
Define test naming conventions and organization

step.title: Quality Gates
step.action: Define automated gates: coverage %, pass rate, performance budgets

step.title: Generate Output
step.action: Compile test plan with risk assessment, strategy, and quality gates

step.title: Optional: Scaffold Test Framework
step.action: Check if the project already has a test framework configured (look for jest.config, vitest.config, playwright.config, pytest.ini, build.gradle test blocks, etc.)
step.ask: Would you like to scaffold the test framework now? /kratos-test-framework will detect your stack, generate config files, folder structure, fixture patterns, and a sample test. Recommended if no test framework is installed yet. (yes/no)
step.action: If yes: run /kratos-test-framework
If no: skip — you can run /kratos-test-framework anytime later
